sglang.title: Better unit tests for adding a new model
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Update the instructions on adding a new model to include more tests.

sglang.title: Pr fix max workers
sglang.author: wellhowtosay
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
the default value for max_workers is the num of cpu on the physical server, this may cause problems when running on a docker with much less cpu cores than its physical server.
#1424
Modifications
add param image_processor_max_workers to ServerArgs as the max_workers for ProcessPoolExecuto

sglang.title: Add a unit test for data parallelism
sglang.author: merrymercy

sglang.title: [API, Feature] Support response prefill for openai API
sglang.author: Ying1123
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Support response prefill for openai API like what anthropic supports:
https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/build-with-claude/prompt-engineering/prefill-claudes-response
Example usage:
# Launch server
python -m sglang.launch_server --model-path meta-llama/Llama-2-7b-chat-hf --port 30000

# Send request

vllm.title: [Model] Refactor BLIP/BLIP-2 to support composite model loading
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR updates BLIP vision encoder to have its own model loading code and support extracting intermediate states, similar to the current CLIP and SigLIP encoders. BLIP-2 has been updated accordingly to take advantage of composite model loading.
This PR also cleans up some of the existing code for o

vllm.title: [Misc] Use NamedTuple in Multi-image example
vllm.author: alex-jw-brooks
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This is a small refactor on the multi-image example to use a NamedTuple so that it's more clear to readers what's getting returned, since a couple of the things in the currently returned tuple are None for most types, e.g., chat template!

vllm.title: [MISC] rename CudaMemoryProfiler to DeviceMemoryProfiler
vllm.author: ji-huazhong
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
CudaMemoryProfiler is not only used by CUDA devices, so it might be more appropriate to name it DeivceMoryProfiler
cc @youkaichao

vllm.title: [Model][VLM] Add LLaVA-Onevision model support
vllm.author: litianjian
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adding support for LLaVA-OneVision model.
FIX #7420
Requrements
This PR requires transformers with this PR merged(You can install it via pip install git+https://github.com/huggingface/transformers)
Example Usage
import av
import time
import numpy as np
from huggingface_hub import hf_hub_down

vllm.title: [SpecDec][Misc] Cleanup, remove bonus token logic.
vllm.author: LiuXiaoxuanPKU
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Since bonus token is enabled by default in #5765, this PR cleans up stale bonus token logic.

vllm.title: [build] enable existing pytorch (for GH200, aarch64, nightly)
vllm.author: youkaichao

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Avoid some bogus messages RE CUTLASS's revision when building
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
CUTLASS tries to detect its revision during the build process, but it doesn't work with the way we're using it in vLLM.
Currently, you might see an error message like this:
  fatal: not a git repository (or any of the parent directories): .git
  -- CUTLASS Revision: Unable to detect, Git returned co

vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Update cpu_extension.cmake to remove dependency on default, which no longer exists.
